Function Documentation

static class_t* bcl_array_class ( array_type_t  type  )  [inline, static]

Return the class of a basic array type. The class must have already been resolved otherwise this function will return a NULL pointer

Parameters:
type The basic array type
Returns:
The array class associated with this basic type

void bcl_link_method ( class_t *  cl,
method_t *  method 
)

Executes the actual linking of a method, implements the METHOD_LOAD field

Parameters:
cl The class owning the requesting method
method The method to be linked

Definition at line 2077 of file loader.c.

References method_t::code, method_t::cp, cp_get_class(), method_t::data, method_t::handlers, initialize_class(), load_bytecode(), load_exception_handlers(), method_is_linked(), method_is_main(), method_set_linked(), thread_self(), tm_lock(), tm_unlock(), and translate_bytecode().

Referenced by interpreter().

const uint8_t* bcl_link_opcode ( const method_t *  method,
const uint8_t *  lpc,
internal_opcode_t  opcode 
)

Link a *_PRELINK opcode. The function behaviour changes depending on the opcode however all that is needed for the opcode to be linked properly is done in this function (for example class initialization). The function returns the same program counter it receives, this is done to 'cast away the constness' of the program counter

Parameters:
method The method holding the opcode to be processed
lpc The program-counter pointing to the opcode to be linked
opcode The opcode value, this is used at the contents of the memory pointed by the program-counter may change if more than one thread tries to link it at the same time
Returns:
The program counter pointing to the linked opcode

Definition at line 2244 of file loader.c.

References array_name(), bcl_resolve_class(), c_throw, class_get_dimensions(), class_get_id(), class_is_abstract(), class_is_parent(), class_is_super(), method_t::code, CONSTANT_Class, CONSTANT_Class_resolved, method_t::cp, cp_get_class(), cp_get_class_name(), cp_get_resolved_class(), cp_get_tag(), dbg_unreachable, field_t::descriptor, gc_free(), gc_malloc(), get_type_specific_opcode(), initialize_class(), JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR, method_create_packed_index(), method_is_init(), method_is_static(), class_t::name, method_t::name, field_t::offset, resolve_class(), resolve_instance_field(), resolve_method(), resolve_static_field(), store_int16_un, thread_self(), tm_lock(), and tm_unlock().

Referenced by interpreter().
